purpose: Define the promotion gate for any alternative model attempting to replace or outperform six-parameter flat Lambda-CDM.
promotion_requirements: closed dynamical specification or explicit phenomenological likelihood rule
frozen prediction vector before holdout inspection
executed likelihood on CMB + BAO + SN + H0
automatic_rejection_conditions: requires post-hoc parameter changes after holdout
degrades CMB fit beyond calibrated tolerance
boundary: Promotion gate only. No alternative model is promoted, validated, or claimed to replace Lambda-CDM.
